_notes: Twinings KB articles — mapped from the 5 incident categories. All SAP-specific runbooks.

articles.title: SAP MDG — Approval Queue Management & Automation
articles.body: Procedures for managing SAP MDG approval queue backlog including batch job rescheduling via SM37, priority escalation workflows, and ZeroOps auto-validation configuration for standard master data correction patterns.

sections.title: Diagnosing Queue Backlog
sections.content: Check MDG workflow inbox via S/4HANA Fiori app 'Manage Workflows'. Review SM37 background job schedule for MDG batch jobs — confirm they are in BACKGROUND not DIALOG class.

sections.title: Immediate Relief — SM37 Rescheduling
sections.content: Transaction SM37 → select MDG batch jobs → reschedule to background WP class. This immediately frees dialog WPs for user sessions. Expected impact: 15% queue throughput improvement within 1 hour.

sections.title: ZeroOps Auto-Validation Setup
sections.content: Configure Change Validator with MDG auto-approval rules: pricing output corrections, GL/COA field mappings, vendor bank details (low-risk). Estimated 60% of queue items eligible for auto-approval.

sections.title: Escalation Triggers
sections.content: Auto-escalate when queue > 200 items, when GL/COA structural changes are pending, or when downstream Ariba PO blocking is detected. ServiceNow auto-ticket raised for senior approver.

articles.title: SAP IAS/IPS — Authorization Request Automation & SoD Checking
articles.body: ZeroOps automated SoD checking and Fiori catalog auto-provisioning runbook — eliminating 76-hour manual authorization queue for standard role requests.

sections.title: Auto-Approval Eligibility Rules
sections.content: Eligible for auto-approval: display roles (SAP_BC_*_DISPLAY), standard Fiori catalog pages (F1234-F2000 range), new starter standard onboarding packs. Not eligible: transaction access to FI posting, HR sensitive data, admin transactions.

sections.title: SoD Check Automation
sections.content: ZeroOps Change Validator runs GRC SoD check via API before any role assignment. Conflict detected → human escalation. Clean result → auto-provision via IAS API. Audit log written to ServiceNow automatically.

sections.title: IAS Provisioning Steps
sections.content: 1. SoD check via SAP GRC API · 2. IAS role assignment via REST API · 3. IPS synchronisation trigger · 4. Fiori catalog assignment · 5. ServiceNow request closed · 6. User notified via Teams.

articles.title: SAP Analytics Cloud — Report Performance & BW Query Optimisation
articles.body: Diagnosis and resolution procedures for SAC report generation timeouts — BW/4HANA CDS view optimisation and SAC query priority configuration.

sections.title: Diagnosing SAC Report Latency
sections.content: Check SAC tenant activity log for report run times > 3min. Identify BW InfoProviders with full table scans via BW/4HANA transaction RSRT. Check HANA memory utilisation via cloud ALM.

sections.title: CDS View Optimisation
sections.content: HANA calculation view alternative for top 5 CDS views — ZeroOps RCA Engine generates optimisation recommendation. Apply via BW/4HANA transport request. Test with RSRT before production deployment.

sections.title: SAC Report Priority Configuration
sections.content: Configure SAC query priority: P1 executive dashboards → dedicated processing slot. P2 management reports → standard queue. P3 ad-hoc → deferred during peak. ZeroOps Capacity Planner auto-applies tiering during month-end.

articles.title: K2 Workflow — Timeout Management & Auto-Restart
articles.body: K2 workflow session timeout resolution — auto-restart procedures for workflows that expire waiting for upstream SAP approval responses.

sections.title: Identifying Timed-Out Workflows
sections.content: K2 Management Console → Active Workflows → filter Status = Expired. Correlate to ServiceNow catalog item status = Stalled. ZeroOps Alert Correlator auto-detects this pattern.

sections.title: Auto-Restart via ZeroOps
sections.content: ZeroOps Remediation Agent monitors for K2 timeout + upstream SAP approval complete events. On detection: restart K2 workflow instance via K2 REST API. ServiceNow item updated. No service desk involvement.

articles.title: SAP Fiori — Cache Management & Post-Maintenance Recovery
articles.body: SAP Fiori tile cache flush procedures — included in post-maintenance runbook to prevent user-facing errors after SAP PCE patching.

sections.title: Post-Maintenance Cache Flush
sections.content: SAP S/4HANA transaction /UI2/FLPD_CONF → Reset Fiori cache. Execute ICM cache flush via SM59. ZeroOps Remediation Agent executes this automatically after maintenance window close.

sections.title: Auto-Detection Pattern
sections.content: ZeroOps Alert Correlator: detect >3 Fiori tile loading errors within 60 seconds of maintenance window end → trigger auto-flush. Pattern confidence 99% — zero false positives in production.

articles.title: SAP Password Reset — Automated via IAS API
articles.body: Fully automated SAP password reset via SAP IAS API — eliminating the 14.5-hour average manual service desk resolution time.

sections.title: Automation Flow
sections.content: User request via ServiceNow self-service portal → identity verified via Azure AD MFA → IAS password reset API call → user notified via Teams and email → ServiceNow ticket auto-closed. Total time: < 60 seconds.

sections.title: Account Unlock — Lockout Recovery
sections.content: SAP IAS lockout after 5 failed attempts → ZeroOps detects lockout alert from Cloud ALM → auto-unlock after MFA verification → unlock logged to GRC audit trail automatically.
